overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game, showing a player holding a pistol while exploring a snowy landscape with a frozen river and wooden cabin under an aurora-lit night sky. Blood splatter effects indicate recent combat damage as the player moves from rocky terrain to a frozen riverbank and approaches a rustic cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy rocky outcrop approaching frozen water

events.description: reaches the edge of frozen river, revealing open water and ice formations

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through deep snow with pistol drawn, blood splatter on screen indicating recent combat damage

entered.detail: large snow-covered boulders blocking the path ahead
dense evergreen trees in the background under green aurora sky
small rustic log cabin with lit windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a snowy landscape dotted with large rock formations, approaching the edge of a frozen body of water. A wooden cabin is visible in the distance to the left, and blood splatter effects cover the screen indicating recent combat.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen riverbank with open water and ice sheets

agents.ego_description: standing at the water's edge surveying the frozen river and distant cabin, weapon ready

entered.detail: partially frozen river with thick ice sheets and snow-covered banks
dark green flowing water visible between ice formations in the river
jagged ice sheets and frozen rocks along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The player stands at the edge of a partially frozen river, observing the open water and ice formations. The wooden cabin has shifted to the right side of the frame as the player surveys the area, with the aurora casting an eerie green glow over the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden cabin across frozen ice

events.description: begins crossing the frozen ice toward the cabin, navigating around holes

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the frozen ice toward the cabin, weapon aimed forward

entered.detail: circular hole in the ice revealing dark water beneath the surface
scattered broken planks and debris near the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The player moves away from the riverbank and crosses the frozen ice toward the cabin, navigating around a dangerous hole in the ice. The cabin grows larger in the frame as the player approaches, with wooden debris scattered near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving through a desolate, snowy wilderness toward a remote wooden cabin under a shimmering aurora. It begins with the player navigating a rocky, snow-covered landscape with blood splatter obscuring the view, heading toward the edge of a frozen body of water. As the camera reaches the riverbank, the view shifts to survey the open water and jagged ice formations while the eerie green glow of the aurora intensifies across the sky. The scene then transitions as the player leaves the bank to cross the frozen surface, carefully navigating around a hole in the ice. Finally, the camera closes the distance to the cabin, which grows larger in the frame as the player approaches the entrance and its surrounding wooden debris.
